title: 8000mAh Dyson V8 Battery Replacement, FLYLINKTECH Battery for Dyson V8 SV10 Compatible with Animal, Absolute, Fluffy, Parquet, Range Vacuum Cleaner with 3 Filters + Cleaning Brush + Screwdriver
features: 🔋【8,000mAh High Capacity】FLYLINKTECH battery for dyson v8 has a capacity of up to 8,000mAh and lasts up to 50% longer than the original battery. It also means that the dyson v8 battery replacement provides superb suction power for your vacuum cleaner. Keeping you satisfied with your vacuum cleaner and clearing away all the hair and other debris from your floors.

🔋【Excellent Compatibility】Our v8 battery replacement supports all the dyson wall charger / stand unit. Widely application in the dyson v8 absolute vacuum, v8 animal vacuum, v8 fluffy vacuum, dyson v8 motorhead vacuum, dyson v8 hand-held series vacuum cleaner, dyson v8 sv10 967834-02 96783402 vacuum cleaner, dyson v8 animal cordless stick vacuum cleaner.

🔋【9-Layer Intelligent Protection】FLYLINKTECH dyson sv03 battery is made with premium imported lithium battery cell which complys with FCC ROHS CE security testing standards.Built-in multiple circuit protection (over-charging, short-circuit, high-temperature, and over current protection) and fire-resistant construction, 1800 times aging tested by manufacturer to match oem products, no memory effect and Virtually no Self-discharge.

🔋【Easy to Install】The installation is very simple.Anyone can do it in just 5 steps in 3-5 minutes. We are giving 2 pre-filter cartridges + 2 screws + 1 brush, high quality Dyson filter replacement parts can be reused after cleaning. NOTE: Do not charge the battery immediately after use. Allow the battery to cool down for 10-20 minutes before charging, especially if the battery gets hot when using max mode.

💌💌【Friendly After-Sale Service】We promise a 12-month assurance and 24 hours online service. If you have any problems with FLYLINKTECH battery, please feel free to contact us at the official FLYLINKTECH email address or through Amazon (Your account - Your orders - Contact the seller), customers' satisfaction is our pursuit, we are always here for you.
